description.en: Find all European flags whose only colours are red and white — no others.

description.en: Find all Asian flags with an animal.

description.en: Find all South American flags without green and without a coat of arms.
description.pl: Znajdź wszystkie południowoamerykańskie flagi bez zieleni i bez godła.
